description_long: This is a small, slender frog with a light brown to tan body, adorned with darker brown spots and markings along its back and limbs. Its skin appears moist and slightly textured, typical of many amphibians, and the limbs are long and thin, with the hind legs notably elongated for jumping. The eyes are prominent and dark, positioned on the sides of the head, providing a wide field of vision. The toes are splayed and appear to have slight webbing, aiding in movement across wet surfaces. The overall build is delicate, with a streamlined body suited for quick, agile movements. The frog is shown next to a color calibration cube for scale, indicating its small size.
description: A small, slender, light brown frog with dark spots, long limbs, and prominent eyes. Its moist, textured skin and elongated hind legs suggest agility and adaptation to wet environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the frog's slender profile, long hind leg extended, and distinct dark markings along the back.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical placement of the hind legs and the spotted pattern running down the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the other profile, with the head and body shape mirrored and the forelimb visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the wide-set eyes, triangular head, and splayed forelimbs.
